title: Section 8
content: 1[8. University open to all persons.--The University shall be open to all persons (including the teachers and taught) of either sex and of whatever race, religion, creed, caste or class: Provided that nothing in this section shall be deemed to prevent religious instruction being given in the manner prescribed by the Ordinances to those who have consented to receive it.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 62 of 1981, s. 5, for section 8 (w.e.f. 10-2-1982).
